title: Richmond L. & R.R. Co. Staten Island, N.Y.
obv: RICHMOND L. & R.R. CO. STATEN ISLAND, N.Y.
rev: Good For One Fare J.J. Kuhn Receiver
notes: J.J. Kuhn served as receiver from April 27, 1920 until August 1, 1923. Tokens were placed in use in 1921 when the fare increased to 8¢ cash or two tokens for 15¢. Streetcar service was discontinued January 24, 1934, after which the system continued as an all-bus operation.

sources.title: Atwood-Coffee Catalogue
sources.note: Staten Island 632 section gives receiver dates, 1921 token-use context, and later service history.

title: Department of Transportation / Good For One Fare NYC
obv: DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION / GOOD FOR ONE FARE NYC
rev: Staten Island Ferry New York City (ferry) GD
notes: Staten Island Ferry tokens were struck for use with a proposed 50¢ fare. The 50¢ fare was postponed in June 1982, and these tokens were stored in vaults until a fare increase.
usage: Intended for Staten Island Ferry fare use.

sources.title: Atwood-Coffee Catalogue
sources.note: Staten Island 632 section states the ferry had 1,000,000 total tokens struck for a new 50¢ fare; existing notes identify this brass issue as 900,000 struck in 1982.

title: Department of Transportation / Good For One Fare NYC
obv: DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION / GOOD FOR ONE FARE NYC
rev: Staten Island Ferry New York City (ferry) GD
notes: White metal issue struck in 1982 but not used. Staten Island Ferry tokens were struck for use with a proposed 50¢ fare, which was postponed in June 1982.
usage: Intended for Staten Island Ferry fare use, but not placed in use.

sources.title: Atwood-Coffee Catalogue
sources.note: Staten Island 632 section states the ferry had 1,000,000 total tokens struck for a new 50¢ fare; existing notes identify this white metal issue as 100,000 struck in 1982 and unused.

title: Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority
obv: TRIBOROUGH BRIDGE AND TUNNEL AUTHORITY / (CREST OF BRIDGE OVER TBTA)
rev: Staten Island Resident Verrazano / Narrows Bridge M

title: A Carousel For All Children / At Willowbrook Park
obv: A CAROUSEL FOR ALL CHILDREN / AT WILLOWBROOK PARK / (2 MAPLE LEAVES)(CAROUSEL HORSE)
rev: A Greenbelt Conservancy Inc. Project / Staten Island New York / Good For 1 Ride
